proposed_relations.description: Bus lane cameras presented as part of the First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: A photograph of a street corner in New York City. In the foreground, a blue and white sign reads "BUS LANE" with bus icons on either side. Below this, a white sign with black text reads "7 AM - 7 PM MON - FRI BUSES ONLY & RIGHT TURNS" with a downward-pointing arrow. A black street lamp post stands behind the sign, featuring two cameras highlighted with red circles.
